violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager is no longer associated with this establishment.

General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Employee observed changing gloves with no handwash in between. Employee observed drinking from cup without handwash after and before returning to work.
General employee practices. — --Employee had drink cup stored above food prep area. Cup did have lid and straw.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -3 door upright fridge at 47-49F. -1 door fridge at 47F.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean the table fan above prep table.
